sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n8267" key="a)ne/ndektos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνέν-δεκτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n8267.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">inadmissible, impossible,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ev.Luc.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">17.1</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0553.tlg001:2:70" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Artem.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.70</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
